name: fx_feed_corruption
title: FX Feed Data Corruption
description: Injects a corrupted CAD/USD FX rate into the market data hub, causing incorrect cross-currency valuation.
background: A data feed aggregator is publishing wrong foreign exchange rates. The CAD/USD pair shows 0.5000 instead of ~0.7380. Portfolio valuations for Canadian securities (RY.TO, TD.TO, AAPL.TO) are severely impacted. This tests whether downstream systems detect anomalous FX rates and raise alerts before using them for NAV calculations.

steps.action: Record current FX rates for all pairs
Attempt to value RY.TO position in USD
steps.expected_state: Valuation is ~25% lower than correct; should trigger FX anomaly alert

steps.action: Test alert threshold: rate deviation >10% from historical
steps.expected_state: System flags CAD/USD as anomalous; prevents downstream NAV update
